title: Apple Store app will soon get an AI shopping assistant
excerpt: But will it be a Genius?
content_html:
The Apple Store app is soon getting an AI bot to help you with your shopping decisions.

MacRumors reported the news after noticing a change in Apple's privacy policy for the Apple Store app.

Now, the document has a paragraph related to a "Virtual Shopping Assistant," explaining that the company "collects and stores your account information, device identifiers, carrier information, chat information, and where enabled, location data to personalize the chat experience, provide relevant responses, and if you opt in, to improve the virtual shopping assistant."

Mashable Light Speed

The document also says that Apple removes personal identifiers from chats before sharing it with partners, and that the data is only being used so that the bot can provide a better conversational response. While it doesn't appear you can completely opt out of this, the part in which you allow Apple to use your chats to improve the experience can be opted in or out of by going to Account > Settings and tapping Chat Improvements within the Apple Store app.

The virtual assistant doesn't appear to be live in the Apple Store app yet.

This is not the first time Apple has added an AI bot to one of its apps; the Apple Support app has one as well, though the feature also isn't live for all users.
content_text: The Apple Store app is soon getting an AI bot to help you with your shopping decisions. MacRumors reported the news after noticing a change in Apple's privacy policy for the Apple Store app. Now, the document has a paragraph related to a "Virtual Shopping Assistant," explaining that the company "collects and stores your account information, device identifiers, carrier information, chat information, and where enabled, location data to personalize the chat experience, provide relevant responses, and if you opt in, to improve the virtual shopping assistant." Mashable Light Speed The document also says that Apple removes personal identifiers from chats before sharing it with partners, and that the data is only being used so that the bot can provide a better conversational response. While it doesn't appear you can completely opt out of this, the part in which you allow Apple to use your chats to improve the experience can be opted in or out of by going to Account > Settings and tapping Chat Improvements within the Apple Store app.The virtual assistant doesn't appear to be live in the Apple Store app yet. This is not the first time Apple has added an AI bot to one of its apps; the Apple Support app has one as well, though the feature also isn't live for all users.

sentences.en: The Apple Store app is soon getting an AI bot to help you with your shopping decisions.
sentences.zh: Apple Store 应用程序很快就会引入人工智能机器人来帮助你做出购物决策。

blocks.html_en: MacRumors reported the news after noticing a change in Apple's privacy policy for the Apple Store app.

sentences.en: MacRumors reported the news after noticing a change in Apple's privacy policy for the Apple Store app.
sentences.zh: MacRumors 在注意到 Apple Store 应用的隐私政策发生变化后报道了这一消息。

blocks.html_en: Now, the document has a paragraph related to a "Virtual Shopping Assistant," explaining that the company "collects and stores your account information, device identifiers, carrier information, chat information, and where enabled, location data to personalize the chat experience, provide relevant responses, and if you opt in, to improve the virtual shopping assistant."

sentences.en: Now, the document has a paragraph related to a "Virtual Shopping Assistant," explaining that the company "collects and stores your account information, device identifiers, carrier information, chat information, and where enabled, location data to personalize the chat experience, provide relevant responses, and if you opt in, to improve the virtual shopping assistant."
sentences.zh: 现在，该文件中有一个与“虚拟购物助手”相关的段落，解释说该公司“收集和存储您的帐户信息、设备标识符、运营商信息、聊天信息以及启用的位置数据，以个性化聊天体验，提供相关响应，如果您选择加入，则可以改进虚拟购物助手。”

blocks.html_en: The document also says that Apple removes personal identifiers from chats before sharing it with partners, and that the data is only being used so that the bot can provide a better conversational response. While it doesn't appear you can completely opt out of this, the part in which you allow Apple to use your chats to improve the experience can be opted in or out of by going to Account > Settings and tapping Chat Improvements within the Apple Store app.

sentences.en: The document also says that Apple removes personal identifiers from chats before sharing it with partners, and that the data is only being used so that the bot can provide a better conversational response.
sentences.zh: 该文件还表示，苹果在与合作伙伴共享之前会从聊天中删除个人标识符，并且这些数据的使用只是为了让机器人能够提供更好的对话响应。

sentences.en: While it doesn't appear you can completely opt out of this, the part in which you allow Apple to use your chats to improve the experience can be opted in or out of by going to Account > Settings and tapping Chat Improvements within the Apple Store app.
sentences.zh: 虽然您似乎无法完全选择退出，但您可以通过转到“帐户”>“设置”并点击 Apple Store 应用程序中的“聊天改进”来选择加入或退出允许 Apple 使用聊天来改善体验的部分。

blocks.html_en: The virtual assistant doesn't appear to be live in the Apple Store app yet.

sentences.en: The virtual assistant doesn't appear to be live in the Apple Store app yet.
sentences.zh: 虚拟助手似乎尚未在 Apple Store 应用程序中上线。

blocks.html_en: This is not the first time Apple has added an AI bot to one of its apps; the Apple Support app has one as well, though the feature also isn't live for all users.

sentences.en: This is not the first time Apple has added an AI bot to one of its apps; the Apple Support app has one as well, though the feature also isn't live for all users.
sentences.zh: 这并不是苹果第一次在其应用程序中添加人工智能机器人。 Apple 支持应用程序也有一个，但该功能并不适用于所有用户。

content_html_zh:
Apple Store 应用程序很快就会引入人工智能机器人来帮助你做出购物决策。

MacRumors 在注意到 Apple Store 应用的隐私政策发生变化后报道了这一消息。

现在，该文件中有一个与“虚拟购物助手”相关的段落，解释说该公司“收集和存储您的帐户信息、设备标识符、运营商信息、聊天信息以及启用的位置数据，以个性化聊天体验，提供相关响应，如果您选择加入，则可以改进虚拟购物助手。”

可混搭光速

该文件还表示，苹果在与合作伙伴共享之前会从聊天中删除个人标识符，并且这些数据的使用只是为了让机器人能够提供更好的对话响应。 虽然您似乎无法完全选择退出，但您可以通过转到“帐户”>“设置”并点击 Apple Store 应用程序中的“聊天改进”来选择加入或退出允许 Apple 使用聊天来改善体验的部分。

虚拟助手似乎尚未在 Apple Store 应用程序中上线。

这并不是苹果第一次在其应用程序中添加人工智能机器人。 Apple 支持应用程序也有一个，但该功能并不适用于所有用户。
